payload.label: picture frame
payload.long_description: Partial right-edge crop of a narrow silver metal picture frame with a rounded outer corner and visible mitered joint, reflective/chrome finish, holding a colorful beach-style poster; appears wall-mounted and photographed close to the camera (approximately 0.8 m away).

message.content: {"label":"picture frame","short_description":"silver metal picture-frame edge crop","long_description":"Partial right-edge crop of a narrow silver metal picture frame with a rounded outer corner and visible mitered joint, reflective/chrome finish, holding a colorful beach-style poster; appears wall-mounted and photographed close to the camera (approximately 0.8 m away).","attributes":["silver metal finish","narrow profile","rounded outer corner","mitered joint","reflective/chrome surface","contains colorful beach poster","partial/right-edge cropped","vertical orientation","appears wall-mounted"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.8}
